mainText:
Welcome to Bank of Entitlement! Where every customer gets a VIP treatment, because you deserve it more than anyone else.

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: I was at a fancy restaurant, enjoying my meal, when suddenly I noticed they were out of the champagne I wanted. I demanded to speak to the manager, expressing my absolute outrage that such a high-class establishment could run out of MY favorite champagne. The manager, clearly flustered by my presence, apologized profusely and ran out to buy a new bottle immediately. As a token of their apology, they offered me a free dessert, which I graciously accepted, all while making it clear that they needed to step up their service to meet my expectations. In the end, not only did I get my champagne, but I also received a full refund for my meal. Another day, another triumph of entitlement!
